positive: An intricate geometric abstract owl silhouette, rendered in a bold, modern art style. The owl is perched on stylized branches, forming a strong central focal point. Use deep midnight blue, gold metallic accents, and cream white for contrast. The design should be highly detailed with clean lines, suitable for repeat apparel printing, featuring Mandalic elements and Art Deco geometry. The composition must be symmetrical and highly contrasting, with sharp, crisp edges and excellent color separation.
